title: How to Apply
description: Resources to help you understand how to apply for an Office of Naval Research contract or grant.
text:
This section includes resources to help you understand how to apply for an ONR contract or grant. Before you submit a proposal for an ONR award, make sure you understand ONR's policies on conflicts of interest.
Get Started with Credentials
Before you can do business with the Office of Naval Research, Department of Navy, Department of Defense and other federal agencies, you may need to obtain certain credentials.
Submit a Proposal for a Research Contract
Learn how to submit a winning proposal to the Office of Naval Research.
Submit an Application for a Grant
Universities, nonprofits and commercial entities may submit grant proposals to enter into a contractual relationship with the Office of Naval Research.
Compliance and Protections
Learn how ONR protects against organizational conflicts of interest and helps ensure human subject research supported by the Department of Navy complies with federal regulations.
Questions?
For inquiries regarding contracts and grants, please refer to the specific Broad Agency Announcement (BAA), BAA Call or Notice of Funding Opportunity (NOFO) for POC information.
